name: Sports Event Auto-Creator
description: Auto-creates event channels for sports (Boxing, Track Field, MotoGP and other sports, ...) from EPG and stream-name searches, with per-sport jobs edited in the UI and a configurable schedule.
author: titooo7

fields.label: Scheduling
fields.description: Set how often the auto-creation runs. Use the interval in minutes, or a 5-part cron expression for full control (cron wins when both are set). Press 'Apply schedule' after changing these. Interval 0 with no cron disables scheduled runs.

fields.label: Run every N minutes
fields.help_text: How often to run all enabled jobs automatically (0 = disabled).

fields.label: Cron expression (optional, overrides interval)
fields.help_text: 5-part cron (minute hour day month weekday) in the system timezone.

fields.label: Display timezone
fields.help_text: IANA timezone used for the times shown in channel names.

fields.label: Assign EPG to created channels
fields.help_text: EPG-search channels are linked to the matched EPG source's guide data; name-search channels with a reliable time get a generated event programme (stored under the inactive 'Sports Event Auto-Creator' EPG source).

fields.label: Generated event programme duration (hours)
fields.help_text: Length of the guide entry generated for name-search event channels.

fields.label: Use stream logo for created channels
fields.help_text: Created channels take the logo of their first stream that has one.

fields.label: Black-screen probe seconds per stream
fields.help_text: Seconds of each stream ffmpeg samples when checking for a black screen (clamped to 3–30). Only used by jobs with 'Skip black-screen streams' enabled.

fields.label: Auto-DVR / Replays
fields.description: Selected event channels can be auto-recorded by Dispatcharr's DVR. Recording is OPT-IN and per job: set 'Auto-record: title patterns' on a job (below) to record only the events you care about — an empty pattern list records nothing. These global settings control the padding, retention, and an optional watcher for Teamarr event channels.

fields.label: Recording pre-roll padding (minutes)
fields.help_text: Start each auto-recording this many minutes before the event start time.

fields.label: Recording post-roll padding (minutes)
fields.help_text: Keep recording this many minutes after the event's scheduled end (overruns).

fields.label: Replay retention (days)
fields.help_text: Delete auto-created recordings (files + rows) once they are older than this many days. 0 disables age-based deletion. Failed/zero-byte auto-recordings are always cleaned up after 1 day. Manual recordings are never touched.

fields.label: Teamarr watcher: channel groups (one per line)
fields.help_text: Optional. Names of channel groups holding Teamarr event channels (tvg-id prefix 'teamarr-event-'). Their EPG programmes are watched and matching ones auto-recorded. Empty = watcher off.

fields.label: Teamarr watcher: title patterns (one per line)
fields.help_text: Record a Teamarr programme only when its title matches at least one of these terms (whole-word, same syntax as the job Search terms). Empty = record nothing.

fields.label: Teamarr watcher: exclude patterns (one per line)
fields.help_text: Teamarr programme titles matching any of these are never recorded.

fields.label: Job name for 'Run one job'
fields.help_text: Only used by the 'Run one job' action.

fields.label: Jobs
fields.description: Enable the plugin to see the per-job settings fields — they are generated from the 'Job names' list. To add or remove a job: edit the list, Save, press 'Reload job fields', then refresh the page.

fields.label: Job names (comma-separated)
fields.help_text: e.g. Track & Field, Boxing, Futsal, Rugby, Tennis

fields.label: Jobs JSON (import / export box)
fields.help_text: To IMPORT: paste a jobs JSON array here, press Save, then press 'Import jobs JSON' (replaces all job settings). To EXPORT: press 'Export jobs JSON', then refresh this page — the JSON appears in this box, ready to copy.

actions.label: Show status
actions.description: Shows the schedule state, when it last fired, and the result of the last run.

actions.label: Run all jobs now
actions.description: Queues an immediate run of all enabled jobs (also applies the schedule).

confirm.title: Run all jobs?
confirm.message: This will delete and recreate event channels in the target groups.

actions.label: Run one job
actions.description: Runs only the job named in the 'Job name' setting.

actions.label: Dry run (preview)
actions.description: Runs all enabled jobs without changing anything; results in the logs.

actions.label: Validate configuration
actions.description: Checks all job settings for errors without running anything.

actions.label: Export jobs JSON
actions.description: Fills the 'Jobs JSON' box with the current configuration (refresh the page, then copy it). Also writes a file in the plugin folder.

actions.label: Import jobs JSON
actions.description: Replaces all job settings with the JSON pasted in the 'Jobs JSON' box (press Save first).

confirm.title: Import jobs configuration?
confirm.message: This replaces ALL current job settings with the pasted JSON. Global settings (schedule, timezone) are kept.

actions.label: Reload job fields
actions.description: Rebuilds the per-job settings fields after changing 'Job names'. Refresh the page afterwards.

actions.label: Apply schedule
actions.description: Creates/updates the background schedule from the settings above.
